response.justification: While the candidate has strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor's thesis work, and his recent roles focus on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse tech stacks
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to new domains quickly
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Lacks any demonstrable fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
